reason_for_classification: Video content shows fitness/gym workout footage with no FLS task components visible. Contains scenes of individuals performing dumbbell exercises, weight machine use, bench press, and general gym activities. The opening frames show 'JAYCE DEFYfitness' branding and gym facility tours. No laparoscopic surgical training equipment, no peg transfer apparatus, no pattern cutting setup, no endoloop trainer, no suture materials, no Penrose drains, or any other FLS task-related equipment is present.

minimal_assessment.recommendation: This video is unrelated to FLS/MISTELS assessment and should not be submitted for scoring.
